takeaway_title: A human uses one AI to discover how to make that AI do better science
notes: Two nested loops: outer Experiment Loop discovers inner Agentic Loop; human sets goal + verifies. Conceptual, no data marks.

takeaway_title: exp-002 scores three loop versions blind: two judges, two-key unblinding
notes: RCB design + two-key double-blind (Key-1 R→arm operator-held, Key-2 E→R CS-held) + blind scoring; combined labelled derived.

takeaway_title: Each loop version adds a cumulative bundle to the previous one — v7→v8→v9
notes: Each version independently intelligible; v8 = v7 + 3 additions (cumulative bundle, NOT single-variable); hashes + file counts shown.

takeaway_title: The v8 loop scores highest with every judge
notes: All 3 arms × 3 score streams on 4 shared dims; per-question spread overlaid (n=3); = talk T4.

takeaway_title: The v8 upgrade improves every question for every judge; the earlier v7 step did not
notes: Primary endpoint = within-question Δ(v8−v7), positive 3/3 all scorers; honest secondary Δ(v7−baseline) not reliably positive.

takeaway_title: The v8 gain is concentrated in creativity and human-scored reasoning
notes: Per-dimension Δ(v8−v7); backs retained claim E207 with a distinct mechanistic message → earns its space.

takeaway_title: exp-003 showcase: identical data + question, two research paths — open comparison, no winner
notes: Symmetric two arms; Baseline→IMPDH2→mycophenolic acid→eosinophilic asthma; v9→PKM2→micheliolide→MS; not scored/verified; = talk T5.

takeaway_title: One AI is used to make that same AI do better science
notes: Simplified from P-S1; big type, one message.

takeaway_title: Every answer is scored blind by two independent judges
notes: Simplified from P-S2; double-blind + two judges + combined-derived.

takeaway_title: The winning loop, v8, adds three review steps on top of v7
notes: Focus on the winner v8; the 3 v8 additions on a v7 base.

takeaway_title: With every judge, the v8 loop scores highest
notes: All 3 arms AND human/operator + CS-harness + combined scores; from P-D1.

takeaway_title: Same start, two different answers — an open comparison, no winner
notes: Graphical abstract of the two exp-003 reports; from P-E1.
